mapper.sql: select r.reservation_id, r.reservation_no, r.user_id, u.nickname, r.venue_id, r.spot_id, s.spot_name, r.reserve_date, r.time_slot, r.deposit_cents, r.status, r.cancel_reason, r.arrive_time, r.expire_time, r.pay_trade_no, r.refund_status, r.create_time, r.update_time from fish_reservation r left join fish_user u on u.user_id = r.user_id left join fish_spot s on s.spot_id = r.spot_id
mapper.select: where r.user_id = #{userId} order by r.create_time desc limit 50
mapper.insert: insert into fish_reservation (reservation_no, user_id, venue_id, spot_id, reserve_date, time_slot, deposit_cents, status, expire_time, create_time) values (#{reservationNo}, #{userId}, #{venueId}, #{spotId}, #{reserveDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{depositCents}, #{status}, #{expireTime}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update fish_reservation set status = #{status}, update_time = sysdate() where reservation_id = #{reservationId}
update fish_reservation set status = 2, arrive_time = #{arriveTime}, update_time = sysdate() where reservation_id = #{reservationId}
update fish_reservation set status = 4, update_time = sysdate() where status in (0, 1) and expire_time <= #{now}
